title: BEM-924 read context
objective:
Run script:
"""
ctx = Path('governance/AGENT_CONTEXT.md')
text = ctx.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore') if ctx.exists() else ''
keys=[]
for line in text.splitlines():
    low=line.lower()
    if any(tok in low for tok in ['bem-920','bem-921','bem-922','bem-923','provider','claude','telegram','elements','contours','prompts','proof','consumer','roadmap','next']):
        keys.append(line)
Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
marker=Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM924_AGENT_CONTEXT_READ.md')
marker.write_text('# BEM-924 AGENT_CONTEXT read\nStatus: READ\nContext exists: '+str(ctx.exists())+'\n\nKey lines:\n'+'\n'.join(keys[-500:])+'\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(marker))
ops_applied.append('BEM924 read AGENT_CONTEXT')
"""
